title: chanekia peckii
side_effects: Chanekia peckii can have side effects if used improperly, such as liver damage, nausea, and dizziness. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to more severe complications, including respiratory failure and seizures. Some individuals may also experience allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and swelling, particularly if they are sensitive to certain compounds found in the plant. Additionally, improper preparation or dosage of Chanekia peckii can exacerbate underlying health conditions, including hypertension and heart disease.
